task: Write a Python function that validates if a given string is a valid AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number)
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy document allowing read-only access to objects in a specific S3 bucket
Write a regular expression pattern that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs (format: 'i-' followed by 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters)
